chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-222 of 2024 C.P. No.D-223 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGE(S) _____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.1027/2024 (Stay/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2025 Mr. Taimoor Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for petitioners in both petitions Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Muhammad Ajmal Solangi, advocate for respondents 4 and 5 Per learned counsel for petitioners, notices have been impugned, however, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same be adjudicated in accordance with law, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners, however, pending the foregoing, no coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for the respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petitions may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Gulsher/PS
